free_text: Cross sections and production yields of 66Ga and
67Ga for proton reactions in natural zinc
The excitation functions and the thick target yields
were measured by means of the stacked foil technique.
Three stacks were irradiated, each of them with an
55.2 mg/cm2). The zinc foils in the first stack
degraded protons from 30.8 to ca 2.5 MeV, in the
second stack (29 foils, average thickness 52.6 mg/cm2)
from 31.5 to ca 4.5 MeV and in the third stack (25
foils, average thickness 58.3 mg/cm2) from 30.9 to ca
5.2 MeV, respectively. The foils had a diameter of
2.47 cm and the individual thicknesses were
